DISCOVERY 301, RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. DEEFENDANT'S COUNSEL INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE IS SUBMITTING TO THE TENTATIVE RULING AND WOULD NOT APPEAR IN COURT THIS MORNING. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. SANCTION AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)

FOLLOWING THE CONCLUSION OF JUDGE BUSCH'S LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

ALVARADO. THE COURT INDICATED THAT IF EVER IT WOULD GRANT RELIEF IT WOULD BE UNDER CCP 473 AND NOT FOR NEW TRIAL. EACH SIDE TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: PAUL H.
